Notes: ECAC Division II Women's Basketball Championship Semifinal #1 ... GBC advances
to face either Bluefield State or West Virginia State in championship game on
3/16 ... GBC's 5th win in last 6 games ... Caldwell's 2nd straight loss ... L.
Chukwueze (GBC) scores season-high 34 pts. & has 6th "double double" of year.
Game.Officials: Gary Zavatkay,  Anthony Bagnoli,  Amy Davagian
